message:
fix(mux): fix new tab stuck on loading, add raw mode prompt, add shutdown debug

- Fix race condition where first keyframe was lost because WebGPU renderer
  wasn't ready yet: decoder now starts immediately and caches the latest
  VideoFrame until the renderer is initialized, then flushes it
- Connection picker prompt now uses raw terminal mode for single-keypress
  selection (no Enter needed), with fallback for piped stdin
- Add shutdown debug prints to trace which server stop step hangs
